scripts.ws:im3:lint: npm run --workspace=apps/integrated-math-3 lint 2>/dev/null || npm run lint --prefix apps/integrated-math-3
scripts.ws:im3:test: npm run --workspace=apps/integrated-math-3 test 2>/dev/null || npm run test --prefix apps/integrated-math-3
scripts.ws:im3:typecheck: npm run --workspace=apps/integrated-math-3 typecheck 2>/dev/null || npx tsc --noEmit --prefix apps/integrated-math-3
scripts.ws:im3:build: npm run --workspace=apps/integrated-math-3 build 2>/dev/null || npm run build --prefix apps/integrated-math-3
